examples: He glanced furtively at the stolid faces of the two detectives.
Presently she gave over skylarking, and moved irresolutely about, sighing once or twice and glancing furtively and wistfully toward Tom.
"Psst! Come over here!" one youth hissed furtively.
Girls whose schools ban the socks can be seen furtively slipping on the forbidden leg-wear after class.
Petersburg resident, saw an SUV parked outside his home, with its driver "furtively hunched over his computer, " and called the cops.
